name: voyage-ai
description: Create text and contextualized chunk embeddings and rerank documents with Voyage AI models for retrieval and RAG pipelines

envVars.name: VOYAGE_API_KEY
envVars.description: Voyage AI API key from the Voyage dashboard (starts with pa-)

tools.name: Create Embeddings
tools.description: Create embedding vectors for one or more texts — use input_type to optimize for retrieval queries vs documents

model.description: Embedding model, e.g. voyage-3.5, voyage-3.5-lite, voyage-3-large, or voyage-code-3

input.description: Texts to embed as an array of strings (max 1,000 items)

input_type.description: Set 'query' for search queries or 'document' for corpus documents; omit for general-purpose embeddings

output_dimension.description: Embedding dimensions: 256, 512, 1024 (default), or 2048 on supported models

output_dtype.description: Output data type: float (default), int8, uint8, binary, or ubinary

truncation.description: Truncate inputs that exceed the model context length (default true); if false, over-length inputs error

tools.name: Rerank Documents
tools.description: Rank candidate documents by relevance to a query with a Voyage reranker — use as a precision pass after vector search

model.description: Reranker model, e.g. rerank-2.5 or rerank-2.5-lite

query.description: The search query to rank documents against

documents.description: Candidate document texts as an array of strings (max 1,000)

top_k.description: Return only the top K most relevant documents (default: all)

return_documents.description: Include the document texts in the response, not just indices and scores (default false)

truncation.description: Truncate query/documents that exceed the model context length (default true)

tools.name: Create Contextualized Embeddings
tools.description: Embed document chunks with document-level context (voyage-context-3) so each chunk vector also captures the surrounding document

inputs.description: List of lists of strings: each inner list is the ordered chunks of one document (or a single query). Max 1,000 inner lists, 16K chunks, 120K tokens total

input_type.description: Set 'query' for search queries or 'document' for corpus documents; omit for general-purpose embeddings

output_dtype.description: Output data type: float (default), int8, uint8, binary, or ubinary

tools.name: Create Multimodal Embeddings
tools.description: Embed interleaved text and images into one vector space (voyage-multimodal models) for visual RAG over screenshots, slides, and PDFs

model.description: Multimodal embedding model, e.g. voyage-multimodal-3.5 or voyage-multimodal-3

inputs.description: List of input objects (max 1,000), each with a 'content' array of parts: {"type": "text", "text": ...} and {"type": "image_url", "image_url": ...} or {"type": "image_base64", "image_base64": "data:image/png;base64,..."} — don't mix URL and base64 images in one request

input_type.description: Set 'query' for search queries or 'document' for corpus documents; omit for general-purpose embeddings

truncation.description: Truncate inputs that exceed the context length (default true)

output_encoding.description: Set 'base64' for base64-encoded embeddings; omit for plain float arrays

prompts.title: Embed texts
prompts.prompt: Create Voyage AI embeddings for the texts I provide and report the model, dimensions, and token usage.

prompts.title: Rerank search results
prompts.prompt: Use Voyage AI rerank-2.5 to order a list of documents I provide by relevance to my query and show the relevance scores.

SETUP_GUIDE.title: Voyage AI API Setup

steps.title: Create a Voyage AI account
steps.description: Sign up at https://dashboard.voyageai.com. New accounts include free trial tokens for every model, which is enough for evaluation without billing.

steps.title: Create an API key
steps.description: In the dashboard, open the API Keys section and create a new key. Copy it immediately.

steps.title: Store the key
steps.description: Add VOYAGE_API_KEY=... to your .env file. Requests authenticate with an Authorization: Bearer header.

steps.title: Verify access
steps.description: Run the Create Embeddings tool with model voyage-3.5 and a single short input string. A 401 means the key is wrong or revoked.

notes: Use the same embedding model (and input_type convention) for indexing and querying — vectors from different models are not comparable
Contextualized chunk embeddings (voyage-context-3) expect each inner list to be one document's chunks in order; regular embeddings treat every array item independently
Usage beyond the free trial tokens is billed per million tokens and requires adding a payment method in the dashboard
